scoredBy: agent (cloud build with Grok TTS fallback)
voProvider: grok-tts (eve voice) — fallback used because cloud agent has no ELEVENLABS_API_KEY; ElevenLabs Victoria preferred when key present

categories.name: Hook strength
categories.rationale: Visual anchor (4 columns supporting house) + title card by frame 30 + first spoken word ('Real') by 0.4s. Hook line 'Real estate builds wealth four ways at once' lands by 1.5s. No greeting, no logo. Loses 2 points: Grok 'eve' voice is competent but not tuned to Ryan Realty brand the way Victoria is — re-run synth-vo locally with ELEVENLABS_API_KEY for the +2.

categories.name: Retention curve / pacing
categories.rationale: 60s with 7 distinct beats, beat durations auto-fit to actual VO segment durations. 25% mark = mid Beat 2 appreciation. 50% mark = mid Beat 3 loan paydown. Pattern interrupt at ~38s (chart reveal). Reveal in final 15% (chart + tagline). No dead time.

categories.name: Caption / on-screen text
categories.rationale: Word-by-word kinetic captions burned in: navy pill, gold border, active word color shifts navy → gold + smooth fade. Reserved safe zone (y 1480-1720) per CLAUDE.md §0.5. Headlines + numeric pills + bar viz on every beat. Verified at frame t=16.5s (active word THOUSAND highlighted).

categories.name: Audio (VO + music + mix)
categories.rationale: VO present (Grok TTS 'eve', tempo-scaled 1.487x to fit 60s budget). Music bed (Long Stroll, CC-BY) sub-mixed at -16dB. Loses 2 points: Grok at 1.487x atempo is on the edge of natural; local Victoria re-render at 1.0x or 1.1x speed will sound noticeably better.

categories.name: Format compliance (length, aspect, codec)
categories.rationale: 60.05s (within [55, 60.5] tolerance), 1080x1920 portrait, 30fps, h264+aac, 3.92MB. ffprobe + blackdetect strict pass.

categories.name: Engagement triggers
categories.rationale: Beat 5 chart is the saveable / shareable hook. Tagline ends on POV that invites comments ('the wealth most people can't see from the outside'). No DM CTA in caption (Matt distributes manually). Caption + hashtag set drafted in post-scripts/.

categories.name: Cover / first-frame thumbnail
categories.rationale: Intro frame at t=1s shows hero illustration (4 columns supporting house) + 'AN EVERGREEN PRIMER' eyebrow + 'The 4 Pillars of Real Estate Wealth' title in brand fonts. Strong scroll-stopper for the topic.

categories.name: CTA
categories.rationale: No CTA in video frame (intentional per VIDEO_PRODUCTION_SKILL.md — no agent name, no phone, no URL). Distribution-side CTA in IG/TikTok caption ('DM me 'PILLARS' for the spreadsheet') drafted in post-scripts/instagram.md.

categories.name: Brand / voice
categories.rationale: Brand palette only (navy #102742, gold #D4AF37, cream #faf8f4). Amboqia headlines, AzoSans/Geist body. No off-brand hex, no white-on-white, no logo in frame. Voice: conversational, no banned words, full sentences, two-clause max. POV outro line.

categories.name: Anti-slop
categories.rationale: Banned-words grep clean. No AI humor. No engagement bait. Numbers traceable (citations.json). Stylized vector illustrations clearly non-photoreal — viewer cannot mistake for real footage. Grok Video scout failed for both candidate beats; deterministic Remotion fallback used. Loses 1 point: AI-generated illustration disclosure not yet shown in caption (will add to post-scripts).

openItems: Local re-run with ELEVENLABS_API_KEY would swap Grok 'eve' for Victoria + drop the 1.487x atempo to ~1.0x. Expected gain: +4 points (hook +2, audio +2). Final ~93/100.
Matt to review video before promotion to public/library/

grokVideoScout.beat1: FAIL — failed manual visual scrub (palette + style drift); deterministic fallback used
grokVideoScout.beat6: FAIL — failed manual visual scrub (background palette swapped); deterministic fallback used

decisionsAtThisRender.music: Long Stroll by Kevin MacLeod (Incompetech, CC-BY 4.0)
decisionsAtThisRender.vo: Grok TTS (eve voice) — ElevenLabs fallback chain in synth-vo.mjs picked Grok because no ELEVENLABS_API_KEY; tempo-scaled 1.487x to fit 60s budget; word timestamps via Grok STT pass on the rendered audio
decisionsAtThisRender.scriptTrim: Original verbose script (309 words / ~125s at Grok pace) preserved in data/4-pillars.json under scriptOriginal; trimmed to 192 words for the in-budget render
